title: Naturalist X Alex's Mobs Compat (Deni's Edition)
description: Thats resource pack makes Alex Mobs and Naturalist so much compatible!
body: That resource pack makes Alex's Mobs and Naturalist so much compatible! That resource pack also compatible with Alex's Delight, if you install this mod :D For those who ask: What makes this resource pack different from the SlayDigger resource pack? - Me: in that it has built-in compatibility with book from Alex Mobs and built-in compatibility with the Alex's Delight Mod. Will the mobs from these two mods be removed, or will they all have different names? - Me: no of course they won't be removed, however these mobs will have unique names. For example: Catfish from Alex's mobs - Wels Catfish, Catfish from Naturalist - Bullhead Catfish and more. ![Dumbo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ebadbfc48f0572a0f338e8783c67d3f9b539f4b.png) You can free use this Resource Pack in your Modpacks, if you use mods like Alex's Mobs and Naturalist.
